pi_items.source: task.json metadata field and confirmed in setup_task.sh and seed_demodb.py which explicitly create and seed database 'demodb'
task.json description line 5 requirement #1 states 'Add a Rating property (type DOUBLE) to the Restaurants class' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #2 states 'Add a Capacity property (type INTEGER) to the Hotels class' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #3 states 'Make Hotels.Name MANDATORY' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #4 states 'Enforce constraints on Hotels.Stars: MIN = 1' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #4 states 'Enforce constraints on Hotels.Stars: MAX = 5' - matches metadata specification exactly

task.json description line 5 requirement #5 states 'Create a composite index named Hotels_Country_Stars_idx on Hotels covering Country and Stars (type NOTUNIQUE)' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #6 states 'Set Rating to 3.5 for ALL restaurants' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #7 states 'Set Capacity to 500 for 5-star hotels' - matches metadata specification exactly
task.json description line 5 requirement #7 states '200 for all other hotels' - matches metadata specification exactly

privileged_info_summary: The task involves schema migration on a synthetic demodb database containing 15 hotels with Stars properties ranging from 4-5, and 11 restaurants. The metadata specifies that agents must: (1) add Restaurants.Rating as DOUBLE and Hotels.Capacity as INTEGER properties, (2) enforce Hotels.Name as MANDATORY, (3) set Hotels.Stars constraints to MIN=1 MAX=5, (4) create a composite NOTUNIQUE index on Hotels (Country, Stars), and (5) backfill data with Rating=3.5 for all restaurants, Capacity=500 for 5-star hotels, and Capacity=200 for others. All metadata specifications match the task description requirements exactly. The database is seeded by seed_demodb.py which generates synthetic data using hardcoded real-world names (e.g., actual hotel names like Hotel Artemide, actual restaurant names like Da Enzo al 29) from 12 countries.
